_meta.what: Format-fit gap: chain SUPPLY vs post PRODUCTION across the 4 IG surfaces.
_meta.rule_basis: Rule #11 (diagnose, don't barrel) · #12 (measure only, the system produces) · #6 (a downstream format-router is the reader).
_meta.note: Structural classification only — a post's surface is read from its on-disk shape, never a self-label.
